api_key.name: MiMo API Key
api_key.hint: Your MiMo API key from https://platform.xiaomimimo.com

zh.name: MiMo API 密钥
zh.hint: 在 https://platform.xiaomimimo.com 获取的 API 密钥

default_voice.name: Default Voice Description
default_voice.default: 一个年轻温柔的女性声音，语速适中，语调自然亲切
default_voice.hint: Default voice description used when none is specified. Describe gender, age, tone, pace, etc.

zh.name: 默认音色描述
zh.hint: 未指定音色时使用的默认描述。描述性别、年龄、音色、语速等特征

auto_format_fix.name: Auto Voice Message Format Fix
auto_format_fix.hint: Before sending, automatically split voice messages into standalone clean messages (without @/reply) so they display correctly on QQ. Also applies to the official <record> tag.

zh.name: 语音消息格式自动修复
zh.hint: 发送前自动把语音拆分为单条干净的消息（不带 @ 和回复），防止 QQ 上语音无法显示。对官方 <record> 标签的语音同样生效
